mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER (ORDER_NO, ORDER_TYPE, ACCT_CD, ORDER_DATE, STATUS, REMARK) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{acctCd}, NOW(), 'WAIT', #{remark})
INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DETAIL (ORDER_NO, ITEM_CD, QTY, UNIT_PRICE, AMT) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{itemCode}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty} * #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NO LIKE CONCAT('PO-', #{dateStr}, '%')
SELECT ORDER_NO as orderNo, ACCT_CD as acctCd, STATUS as status, ORDER_DATE as orderDate FROM TB_ORDER WHERE ORDER_TYPE = 'BUY' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC

SELECT A.ORDER_NO, A.ACCT_CD, A.ORDER_DATE, A.STATUS, A.REMARK, B.ITEM_CD, B.QTY, B.UNIT_PRICE, B.AMT FROM TB_ORDER A LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_DETAIL B ON A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO WHERE A.ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ORDER SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE ORDER_NO = #{orderNo}
